word: H8138 - שָׁנָה - shânâh - shaw-naw' - Do again

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁנה

Transliteration: shânâh

Phonetic: shaw-naw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to repeat, do again, change, alter
    1. (Qal) to change
    2. (Niphal) to be repeated
    3. (Piel) to change, alter
    4. (Hithpael) to disguise oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2421

Part(s) of speech: Verb
